receipts.receipt_grade: P: package artifact and component anchor verified; live execution trace still required
receipts.falsification_rule: If no artifact, dataset, source packet, or run trace is attached, the component may not be presented as built beyond a proof plan.
receipts.next_strengthening_action: Promote from package-verified receipt to live proof by attaching one run trace, screenshot packet, or executable replay.
